song.title: You'll Come
song.lyrics:
[V1] I have decided I have resolved To wait upon you Lord My rock and redeemer Shield and reward I’ll wait upon you Lord
[P] As surely as the sun will rise You’ll come to us Certain as the dawn appears
[C] You’ll come Let your glory fall As you respond to us Spirit reign Flood into my Thirsty hearts again You’ll come You’ll come
[V2] We are not shaken We are not moved We wait upon you Lord Our Mighty deliverer Our triumph and truth We wait upon you Lord
[P2] As surely as the sun will rise You’ll come to us Certain as Your Word endures
[B] Chains be broken Lives be healed Eyes be opened Christ is revealed
